title: How souls work in EVA
wikitext: []: How souls work in EVA             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Mon May 22, 2023 12:11 pm When a new human comes into being, how does he or she obtain his or her soul in EVA? Does a fraction of Lilith's soul come off of her and "ensoul" the new human? When said human dies, does that soul reunite with Lilith's, and make up a part of what will become new souls, thereby losing his or her individuality?

Article: How souls work in EVA
[]: How souls work in EVA             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Mon May 22, 2023 12:11 pm When a new human comes into being, how does he or she obtain his or her soul in EVA? Does a fraction of Lilith's soul come off of her and "ensoul" the new human? When said human dies, does that soul reunite with Lilith's, and make up a part of what will become new souls, thereby losing his or her individuality?
